name: AOA
desc: You can perform maneuvers that make lesser airframes blush. Allows for Maneuvers tagged with AOA.

name: PSM
desc: Reduce the energy cost of Maneuvers tagged with AOA by one.

name: VTOL
desc: You can hover to take off and land or for fun. Your Manuverability becomes -1 while doing so, but gain +1 A2G.

name: STOL
desc: You're capable of taking off and landing on extremely short runways.

name: Common
desc: Generic-ah plane. After Bailing Out, you don't risk losing a license level.

name: Gunless
desc: Have to spend Capacity or Employ Ordnance to attack.

name: High-Strung
desc: Whenever you suffer consequences from a Manuverability check, roll Reaction. If you fail, take 2 hits to your Survivability.

name: Multicrew
desc: Your plane has more than just the pilot aboard. Helps avoid loneliness in the air.

name: Multiengine
desc: Your plane has more than one engine! That makes it more reliable and look cooler.

name: Naval
desc: You can operate off of a carrier. Naval (CATOBAR) designates the capability to operate off of catapult-based carriers.

name: Subsonic
desc: Your plane is not capable of breaking the sound barrier. You will always be considered slower than an aircraft that can, suffering Disadvantage or even instantly Failing checks with Supersonic aircraft involved.

name: Sweep
desc: Your wings can sweep in and out! As part of your Positioning Maneuver, you may gain +1 Manu at the cost of -1 Speed and vice versa.

name: Stealth
desc: Double Escalation cost to target you unless you've attacked.
